assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture exposes WorkGraph public types from contracts and core without exposing storage
assertionResults.title: exposes WorkGraph public types from contracts and core without exposing storage

assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture keeps recursive task hierarchy SQL inside core-owned storage/traversal modules
assertionResults.title: keeps recursive task hierarchy SQL inside core-owned storage/traversal modules

assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture forbids legacy task_relations.groups from being used as a hierarchy traversal source
assertionResults.title: forbids legacy task_relations.groups from being used as a hierarchy traversal source

assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture ignores legacy groups fixtures while still catching production traversal shortcuts
assertionResults.title: ignores legacy groups fixtures while still catching production traversal shortcuts

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService loads ancestor chains for multiple roots with one parent_id-only recursive query
assertionResults.title: loads ancestor chains for multiple roots with one parent_id-only recursive query

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService loads direct children for multiple parents with one parent_id batch query
assertionResults.title: loads direct children for multiple parents with one parent_id batch query

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService projects a descendant tree with cursor pagination and max depth using one recursive query
assertionResults.title: projects a descendant tree with cursor pagination and max depth using one recursive query

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService uses the paginated tree projection for descendant traversal
assertionResults.title: uses the paginated tree projection for descendant traversal

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService summarizes direct and subtree rollup counts with explicit percent denominator rules
assertionResults.title: summarizes direct and subtree rollup counts with explicit percent denominator rules

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService flags stale direct-child projections when expected rollup counts disagree with storage
assertionResults.title: flags stale direct-child projections when expected rollup counts disagree with storage

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService groups role-filtered ready frontier tasks and separates dependency blockers from gate blockers
assertionResults.title: groups role-filtered ready frontier tasks and separates dependency blockers from gate blockers

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphRelationQueryService lists outgoing task_relations with stored reasons and without dependencies by default
assertionResults.title: lists outgoing task_relations with stored reasons and without dependencies by default

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphRelationQueryService lists incoming relation edges and maps null reasons to undefined
assertionResults.title: lists incoming relation edges and maps null reasons to undefined

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphRelationQueryService defaults to both directions and preserves advisory relation semantics
assertionResults.title: defaults to both directions and preserves advisory relation semantics

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphRelationQueryService keeps dependencies opt-in and tags them separately from relation rows
assertionResults.title: keeps dependencies opt-in and tags them separately from relation rows
